---
title: "Publications & research"
---

Peer-reviewed work, preprints, talks, and the thesis. This list is kept current;
entries in progress are marked as such. Placeholders below show the structure and
will be filled in as work is published or presented.

## Peer-reviewed

*None yet listed.*

<!-- Template — copy per entry:
- Author(s). "Title." *Journal*, year. [DOI](https://doi.org/…)
-->

## Preprints

*None yet listed.*

<!--
- Author(s). "Title." medRxiv, year. [Preprint](https://www.medrxiv.org/…)
-->

## Thesis

- **West Nile virus surveillance in California: environmental drivers,
  surveillance effort, and spatiotemporal patterns of mosquito-pool infection.**
  MPH thesis, University of Memphis. In progress; expected 2027.
  [Project page](projects/wnv-thesis.qmd)

## Talks & presentations

*None yet listed.*

<!--
- "Title." Event, location, month year. [Slides](…)
-->

## Posters

*None yet listed.*

<!--
- Author(s). "Title." Conference, year. [Poster (PDF)](…)
-->

## Working manuscripts

*None yet listed.*

---

::: {.callout-note appearance="simple"}
Preprint, DOI, slide, and poster links go in the sections above as each item
lands. Dates are given as year, or "in progress" until final.
:::
